12440 S Trumbull Ave, Alsip, IL 60803, USA

Dwarf crabapple. On 123rd Street, from Pulaski and heading east, there are over a dozen of these ornamental--and good for the birds!--trees. The ripe fruit is a dark mahogany red. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: August-September.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
Tons of Smooth Sumac shrubs located all along this portion of the Cal Sag trail. Very easily accessible only feet from the paved trail. Access: Public.
